TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Dick_Barnett, title = Dick_Barnett, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dick_Barnett} }

S.FORM: Dick Barnett sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1936, ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 10, Dick Barnett, squliq na p'unro. qnxan na raral Barnett mqwas beh Theodore Roosevelt pqwasan biru.hiya ga blaq balay na p'unro maki Indiana . Barnett krahu' pqwasan biru,hiya tmwang mzyu mari pspung,qani sazing mzyu mari hlahuy African American,hiya ga te qutux pspung. Oscar Robertson NBA 球星,hiya magal kwara 州 榮譽. krahu pqwasan biru na qyanux Barnett magal Tennessee A&I pqwasan biru mzyu mari sqabu pira. John McLendon cbaqan Barnett mzyu mari.krahu' pqwasan biru ,magal "Dick the Skull" lalu. hiya magal cyugal 次 Associated Press Little pqwasan biru kwara Amerika blaq squilq na p'unro ru mlakux 36 pspung ru NAIA kwara koka magal te qutux. 1957 kawas,Barnett magal blaq balay 陣容 ru te qutux na squilq maki kwara Amerika na 非裔Amerika squilq. 1958-1959 kawas,magal te qutux MPV. 1986 kawas,Barnett tmwang NAIA Hall of Fame.1990 kawas,pqwasan biru 退役 hiya 12 mzyu mari lukus.1993 kawas,hiya tmwang Indiana mzyu mari Hall of Fame.2005 kawas hiya wal magal Tennessee smlokah hi na Hall of Fame.2007 kawas hiya ru sinsiy John McLendon msqun tmwang mzyu mari Hall of Fame maki koka krahu' pqwasan biru. 2012 kawas,Barnett tmwang NAIA 75 kawas kwara 明星 hlahuy.2016 kawas hiya tmwang cipoq na pqwasan biru mzyu mari Hall of Fame. 2019 kawas,1957-59 pspung ryax, Tennessee A&I 老虎 mlikuy tmwang Naismith mzyu mari Hall of Fame. pincyogan na qnxan Syracuse Nationals Barnett te qutux na sangka NBA 秀選,wal galan Syracuse komintwey .tama te tzyu na squilq psibay maki Larry Costello ru Hal Greer.新秀,hiya magal 12.4分. 1960-61 kawas pspung ryax,hiya magal 16.9分,magal te pitu maki league's suruw 場. Cleveland Pipers 1961 kawas,hiya ru(ABL)Cleveland Pipers 簽 biru. John McLendon pcbaq mzyu mari lahuy.1961-1962 kawas ABL te qutux na squilq.1961 kawas 12 byacing 21 ryax,komin lahuy magal qutux 法庭命令,ini tmwang qasa na Amerika mzyu mari lanmotue. Los Angeles Lakers 1962 kawas 9 byacing 7 ryax, Syracuse komintue 35000 Amerika pila mzyu mari na squilq galun Los Angeles Lakers,t'rang kinbkesan wagiq pila 交易.raral ga hiya maki Lakers 擔任 te tzyu squilq na psibay. hiya qelis kakay ini pspung 27 場 maki Western,suruw lga magal West te qutux. qnxan nya Barnett tmasoq mqwas Fordham krahu' pqwasan biru. 2007 kawas maki St. John's krahu' pqwasan biru mhngan la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Dick Barnett sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1936, ryax sa tay 2 nqu tay 10, Dick Barnett, squliq na p'unro. qnxan na raral Barnett mqwas beh Theodore Roosevelt pqwasan biru.hiya ga blaq balay na p'unro maki Indiana . Barnett krahu' pqwasan biru,hiya tmwang mzyu mari pspung,qani sazing mzyu mari hlahuy African American,hiya ga te qutux pspung. Oscar Robertson NBA 球星,hiya magal kwara 州 榮譽. krahu pqwasan biru na qyanux Barnett magal Tennessee A&I pqwasan biru mzyu mari sqabu pira. John McLendon cbaqan Barnett mzyu mari.krahu' pqwasan biru ,magal "Dick the Skull" lalu. hiya magal cyugal 次 Associated Press Little pqwasan biru kwara Amerika blaq squilq na p'unro ru mlakux 36 pspung ru NAIA kwara koka magal te qutux. 1957 kawas,Barnett magal blaq balay 陣容 ru te qutux na squilq maki kwara Amerika na 非裔Amerika squilq. 1958-1959 kawas,magal te qutux MPV. 1986 kawas,Barnett tmwang NAIA Hall of Fame.1990 kawas,pqwasan biru 退役 hiya 12 mzyu mari lukus.1993 kawas,hiya tmwang Indiana mzyu mari Hall of Fame.2005 kawas hiya wal magal Tennessee smlokah hi na Hall of Fame.2007 kawas hiya ru sinsiy John McLendon msqun tmwang mzyu mari Hall of Fame maki koka krahu' pqwasan biru. 2012 kawas,Barnett tmwang NAIA 75 kawas kwara 明星 hlahuy.2016 kawas hiya tmwang cipoq na pqwasan biru mzyu mari Hall of Fame. 2019 kawas,1957-59 pspung ryax, Tennessee A&I 老虎 mlikuy tmwang Naismith mzyu mari Hall of Fame. pincyogan na qnxan Syracuse Nationals Barnett te qutux na sangka NBA 秀選,wal galan Syracuse komintwey .tama te tzyu na squilq psibay maki Larry Costello ru Hal Greer.新秀,hiya magal 12.4分. 1960-61 kawas pspung ryax,hiya magal 16.9分,magal te pitu maki league's suruw 場. Cleveland Pipers 1961 kawas,hiya ru(ABL)Cleveland Pipers 簽 biru. John McLendon pcbaq mzyu mari lahuy.1961-1962 kawas ABL te qutux na squilq.1961 kawas 12 byacing 21 ryax,komin lahuy magal qutux 法庭命令,ini tmwang qasa na Amerika mzyu mari lanmotue. Los Angeles Lakers 1962 kawas 9 byacing 7 ryax, Syracuse komintue 35000 Amerika pila mzyu mari na squilq galun Los Angeles Lakers,t'rang kinbkesan wagiq pila 交易.raral ga hiya maki Lakers 擔任 te tzyu squilq na psibay. hiya qelis kakay ini pspung 27 場 maki Western,suruw lga magal West te qutux. qnxan nya Barnett tmasoq mqwas Fordham krahu' pqwasan biru. 2007 kawas maki St. John's krahu' pqwasan biru mhngan la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *iʦ~ʨk βarnett s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj **, *iʦ~ʨk βarnett, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. qnxan na raral βarnett mqwas~ɕ βeħ tħeo*ore roos~ɕe*elt pqwas~ɕan βiru.ħija ɣa βlaq βalaj na pʔunro maki in*iana . βarnett kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru,ħija tmwaŋ mzju mari ps~ɕpuŋ,qani s~ɕaziŋ mzju mari ħlaħuj a*riʦ~ʨan ameriʦ~ʨan,ħija ɣa te qutux ps~ɕpuŋ. os~ɕʦ~ʨar roβerts~ɕon nβa **,ħija maɣal kwara * **. kraħu pqwas~ɕan βiru na qjanux βarnett maɣal tennes~ɕs~ɕee a&i pqwas~ɕan βiru mzju mari s~ɕqaβu pira. *oħn mʦ~ʨlen*on ʦ~ʨβaqan βarnett mzju mari.kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru ,maɣal "*iʦ~ʨk tħe s~ɕkull" lalu. ħija maɣal ʦ~ʨjuɣal * as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiate* pres~ɕs~ɕ little pqwas~ɕan βiru kwara amerika βlaq s~ɕquilq na pʔunro ru mlakux ** ps~ɕpuŋ ru naia kwara koka maɣal te qutux. **** kawas~ɕ,βarnett maɣal βlaq βalaj ** ru te qutux na s~ɕquilq maki kwara amerika na **amerika s~ɕquilq. ****-**** kawas~ɕ,maɣal te qutux mp*. **** kawas~ɕ,βarnett tmwaŋ naia ħall o* *ame.**** kawas~ɕ,pqwas~ɕan βiru ** ħija ** mzju mari lukus~ɕ.**** kawas~ɕ,ħija tmwaŋ in*iana mzju mari ħall o* *ame.**** kawas~ɕ ħija wal maɣal tennes~ɕs~ɕee s~ɕmlokaħ ħi na ħall o* *ame.**** kawas~ɕ ħija ru s~ɕins~ɕij *oħn mʦ~ʨlen*on ms~ɕqun tmwaŋ mzju mari ħall o* *ame maki koka kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ,βarnett tmwaŋ naia ** kawas~ɕ kwara ** ħlaħuj.**** kawas~ɕ ħija tmwaŋ ʦ~ʨipoq na pqwas~ɕan βiru mzju mari ħall o* *ame. **** kawas~ɕ,****-** ps~ɕpuŋ rjax, tennes~ɕs~ɕee a&i ** mlikuj tmwaŋ nais~ɕmitħ mzju mari ħall o* *ame. pinʦ~ʨjoɣan na qnxan s~ɕjraʦ~ʨus~ɕe nationals~ɕ βarnett te qutux na s~ɕaŋka nβa **,wal ɣalan s~ɕjraʦ~ʨus~ɕe komintwej .tama te tzju na s~ɕquilq ps~ɕiβaj maki larrj ʦ~ʨos~ɕtello ru ħal ɣreer.**,ħija maɣal **.**. ****-** kawas~ɕ ps~ɕpuŋ rjax,ħija maɣal **.**,maɣal te pitu maki leaɣueʔs~ɕ s~ɕuruw *. ʦ~ʨle*elan* pipers~ɕ **** kawas~ɕ,ħija ru(aβl)ʦ~ʨle*elan* pipers~ɕ * βiru. *oħn mʦ~ʨlen*on pʦ~ʨβaq mzju mari laħuj.****-**** kawas~ɕ aβl te qutux na s~ɕquilq.**** kawas~ɕ ** βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ** rjax,komin laħuj maɣal qutux ****,ini tmwaŋ qas~ɕa na amerika mzju mari lanmotue. los~ɕ aŋeles~ɕ lakers~ɕ **** kawas~ɕ * βjaʦ~ʨiŋ * rjax, s~ɕjraʦ~ʨus~ɕe komintue ***** amerika pila mzju mari na s~ɕquilq ɣalun los~ɕ aŋeles~ɕ lakers~ɕ,tʔraŋ kinβkes~ɕan waɣiq pila **.raral ɣa ħija maki lakers~ɕ ** te tzju s~ɕquilq na ps~ɕiβaj. ħija qelis~ɕ kakaj ini ps~ɕpuŋ ** * maki wes~ɕtern,s~ɕuruw lɣa maɣal wes~ɕt te qutux. qnxan nja βarnett tmas~ɕoq mqwas~ɕ *or*ħam kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru. **** kawas~ɕ maki s~ɕt. *oħnʔs~ɕ kraħuʔ pqwas~ɕan βiru mħŋan la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
